scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @cardspark/tokens && npm run build -w @cardspark/ui
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run test:package -w @cardspark/ui
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @cardspark/tokens && npm run build -w @cardspark/ui && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.lint: npm run build -w @cardspark/tokens && npm run build -w @cardspark/ui && npm run lint --workspaces --if-present
